product_results.title: Mens Nylon Cell Phone Holster Belt Clip Pouch Purse Waist Bag Compatible for Apple iPhone 16 Pro Max Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra S24+ A55 A54 A35 A25 A15 Google Pixel 9 Pro OnePlus 12 Open (Blue)

authors_reviews.title: Top quality product. Same as the I bought over 6 years ago that I still use.
authors_reviews.text: My Samsung A56 fits into this phone pouch with an extra 1/2" or 13mm above the phone. I had it in my last identical pouch that is now 6+ years old but by a 1/2" or 13 mm shorter that housed my Samsung A50 that I bought back in 2019.The second pouch is handy for either a second mobile phone or items like a Samsung T5 500 Gb SSD and extra USB memeory sticks.
authors_reviews.author: Tech

authors_reviews.title: Good size, protect my phone
authors_reviews.text: I used cellphone lanyard before I got this. I need something to prevent my cellphone slip away from me with my careless. Cellphone lanyard did help on this but I find out that the lanyard could damage my cellphone case eventually. So I got this one which provides me a sense of security that my phone is always with me. The linen exterior seems water resisted, and 2 compartments provide me enough space for my small belongs in addition to the phone. Yes, it is like a kind of funny pack with more cushioning to protect my belongs. I like it for daily use.
authors_reviews.author: King King

authors_reviews.title: Good Little Travel Pouch for Passport, Boarding Pass with an iPhone & Accessories
authors_reviews.text: Priced around $17 at the time of this review, I think this little 7"H x 4"W x 1.5"D pouch is great for air travel. With two zippered compartments and a small open-front slot, you can keep your cellphone, passport, boarding pass, and earbuds all together. It features a belt loop, a carabiner clip, and a thin detachable strap.The pouch is lightweight and features an outer water-resistant nylon material with a subtle grid pattern. The inside pouches are lined with a softer, microfiber-like material to keep your electronics scratch-free. I'm using this pouch to keep my digital audio player, wired IEMs and passport together as I travel. I think it would also accommodate some smaller power banks. I appreciate that I can easily toss it inside my backpack and retrieve it when needed, especially during travel. I think the overall build quality is great for the price point, and the zippers operate smoothly and without any resistance or snags. A recommended buy based on my experience with it, and I believe it will also be durable enough for years to come.
authors_reviews.author: Mr. Review

authors_reviews.title: Pratique
authors_reviews.text: Facile à porter, liber3 les mains et les poches, excellent pour mettre téléphone et passeport ou porte monnaie
